title: [codereview-pass1-correctness] coap_dtn.c:22-32 init does not call lichen_dtn_expire_old on startup or schedule periodic expiry per spec 9.8
description: coap_dtn.c:22-32 - missing expiry handling breaks S&F TTL enforcement. Must call lichen_dtn_expire_old(&s_dtn_buffer, now_unix) at init and on timer. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-qk8y. P0 codereview
close_reason: Fixed in one pass with 12 codereviews across init buffer handler expiry chunks; all 3 passes clean per chunk; Zephyr native_sim and DTN pytest passed with independent vectors; mutex added per security; full lichen_dtn_buffer integration and GET handler with SenML/OSCORE per spec
